summary: Iteration 8 — verified all 4 review-request feature sets end-to-end: (1) class_level on students/exams, (2) assigned_student_ids picker syncing into student.exam_ids with strict visibility filtering, (3) tag presets (JEE Mains/JEE Advanced/MHT-CET/NEET) on Exam dialog, (4) all published courses (free + paid) listed for students with locked-preview for unpurchased paid courses and full purchase→approve→unlock flow. 6/6 backend pytests pass; UI selectors all present.

minor.issue: When a paid course is not purchased, response returns chapters=[] and locked=true (intentional per spec). However the response still echoes price/name/description publicly — fine for preview, but note that `cover_url` and `description` are visible without auth check. Not a bug, just an FYI.

update_exam re-syncs assigned_student_ids → students.exam_ids (adds new + pulls removed). Works correctly. Edge case: if an admin clones an exam (POST /exams/{id}/clone), the cloned exam keeps the original assigned_student_ids array but does NOT push the new clone id into those students' exam_ids. Cosmetic — clones are unpublished by default so it self-resolves once admin saves. Could be tightened.

verified_behaviors: /admin/exams Create Exam dialog now exposes: data-testid='exam-class' (Class/Section select), data-testid='exam-tag' (input), tag preset buttons data-testid='tag-preset-JEE-Mains', 'tag-preset-JEE-Advanced', 'tag-preset-MHT-CET', 'tag-preset-NEET' — clicking NEET fills exam-tag with 'NEET' ✓

Exam dialog has a new data-testid='tab-students' tab containing data-testid='student-search', data-testid='student-select-all', and per-student checkboxes data-testid='spick-<sid>' (3 rows visible for current 3 students) ✓

Backend POST /api/exams with assigned_student_ids=[demo_id] persists the array AND appends the exam id to that student's exam_ids array (verified via GET /api/admin/students). PUT /api/exams/{id} syncs (adds + pulls) correctly.

Visibility filter (CRITICAL): exam assigned to demo IS visible to demo on GET /api/exams; an identical published+free exam assigned ONLY to another student is HIDDEN from demo. Backend pytest covers both cases.
/admin/students Add Student dialog exposes data-testid='form-class-level' dropdown (11th/12th); table renders a 'Class' column. Persists & updates correctly via POST/PUT /api/admin/students.

/app/courses now lists ALL published courses (free + paid). 2 paid 'Buy ₹X' buttons (data-testid='buy-course-<id>') render. Already-purchased courses would show 'PURCHASED' + 'Open' (no purchases present for demo so confirmed via the catalog logic).

GET /api/student/courses/{id} for paid+unpurchased returns {locked:true, chapters:[]} as designed. After admin approves payment, same endpoint returns locked falsy with full chapters including 'Ch1-secret' content.
Course detail /app/courses/<paid id> shows 'Course content is locked' screen with data-testid='cd-buy-now' (Unlock for ₹X) button — screenshot confirms.

End-to-end purchase flow: POST /api/student/payment-request (UTR=TEST<ts>IT8) → pending payment created → POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/approve → student.course_ids updated → GET /api/student/courses/{id} unlocks → /api/student/my-purchases lists status=success. All steps green in backend pytest.
action_items: (Optional) clone_exam doesn't push the new exam id into assigned students' exam_ids. Consider re-running the sync or clearing assigned_student_ids on clone to avoid stale references.

(Optional) After approval, /api/student/my-purchases returns rows with item_type='course' but no convenient link field; frontend builds /app/courses/<item_id> link client-side — works fine, just call out for future API consumers.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_exams.py:60-87 student-visibility logic correctly handles 3 cases (purchased/assigned-explicit/published-free + filters). Class filter only applies when BOTH exam.class_level AND student.class_level are set — this is permissive (an exam targeted at '12th' will still show to a student whose class_level=='' which means 'unspecified'). Spec says 'no class filter' for free-published — current behaviour matches.

routes_student.py:77-89 get_course strips chapters for unowned paid courses but keeps cover_url/description — acceptable preview surface. Free courses (price==0) return full chapters even if not 'purchased' since the price gate short-circuits — confirmed working.
routes_admin.py:115-137 create_student persists class_level. update_student also accepts class_level via StudentUpdate. Good.
routes_exams.py:113-118 sync uses $addToSet so re-assigning won't dupe exam_ids. The remove-side $pull on update_exam (line 143-146) correctly handles students removed from the list.

Frontend /app/courses Buy button correctly maps purchased=true to Open / purchased=false to Buy via API field c.purchased. Verified data-testid pattern aligns with the spec ('buy-course-<id>' / 'open-course-<id>'). PaymentDialog component reused for both Buy CTAs.
Loop fix: routes_exams.py list_exams runs an N+1 query (per-exam attempts lookup) on the student path — fine at small scale but could be aggregated for >1k exams. Pre-existing, not iter8 regression.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all spec'd data-testid selectors found, end-to-end flow visually confirmed for locked course)

test_credentials: admin@gyansai.com / admin123 (admin); demo / demo123 (student). Both verified working.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_iter8_* exams, students, courses were created and deleted within their own tests. Stray 'JEE Mains Test - 12th' sanity exam (left by main agent) was deleted from DB during cleanup. No residual TEST_ artefacts remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter8_classes_assigned_courses.py — uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env OR parses /app/frontend/.env. Auth endpoints are POST /api/auth/admin/login and POST /api/auth/student/login. Exam visibility filter: free-published exams hide when assigned_student_ids non-empty & current student not in list; purchased/explicitly-assigned exams always visible (via student.exam_ids). Paid courses unowned → GET /api/student/courses/{id} returns chapters=[] locked=true. Admin can approve payments via POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/approve — grants course_ids/exam_ids accordingly. Login button text is 'Sign In as Admin' / 'Sign In as Student' (not 'Login') — selector hint for future Playwright. Iter7 tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_folders_ocr.py still pass (folders + OCR unchanged).
rca of the issue: N/A — all features verified working as specified.
